name: wft-institutions
description: WFT Institutions demo ERP — single campus, single database.

scripts.dev: node scripts/free-dev-port.mjs && concurrently -n backend,frontend "npm run dev -w @college-erp/backend" "npm run dev -w @college-erp/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/backend && npm run build -w apps/frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w apps/backend && npm run typecheck -w apps/frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/backend && npm run lint -w apps/frontend
scripts.check: npm run prisma:generate && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
